---
title: "William & Mary Visit Materials"
---

Hello! These are the materials from my teaching demonstration and presentation on February 16, 2022. They will expire on March 15, 2022.

**Teaching Demonstration**

- [Jamboard: "What is good about living in a democracy?"](https://jamboard.google.com/d/1hq1L6gBVxsTPebnVrGZIiz-qDGtvqoKbLhrg4FUN0Ag/edit?usp=sharing) 

- [Slides](wm/wm_demo.html)

**Teaching presentation**

- [Slides](wm/wm_presentation.html)
